notes: Duplicate const declarations (BUL_MAX, BUL_LIFE, BUL_SPEED) cause JS errors in strict mode; ship invulnerability flicker logic is inverted (hides ship when visible); thrust flame uses rand() in render causing flicker; overlay uses textContent with \n which won't line-break; core gameplay loop works but several bugs reduce quality.
The build resembles Asteroids visually, but it contains a fatal JavaScript error from duplicate const declarations that prevents gameplay and makes controls/functionality effectively unusable.
